assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 7: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches the expected values exactly (Role: Rust backend service, Serena Instance: serena_backend, Path: /home/user/trustify-backend).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 8: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — new trustify-ui entry is present with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md uses explicit 'Preserved (no changes)' and 'Added' subsections under each major section. Repository Registry: trustify-backend listed under 'Preserved (no changes)' (line 9), trustify-ui listed under 'Added' (line 17). Jira Configuration: all fields listed under 'Preserved (no changes)' (line 23). Code Intelligence: existing content listed under 'Preserved (no changes)' (line 39), serena_ui limitation listed under 'Added' (line 46).

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 9: serena_backend status is 'Already in Registry'. Line 10: serena_ui status is 'NEW -- added to Registry'. Lines 13-14: serena_backend 'Status: Already configured in Repository Registry', 'Action: No changes needed'. Lines 18-19: serena_ui 'Status: Not in Repository Registry -- newly discovered'.

assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-21: naming convention 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' preserved. Lines 25-29: serena_backend find_symbol example preserved exactly. Line 33: serena_backend limitation 'rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use' preserved. Line 34: '`serena_ui`: No known limitations' is the only new addition. All existing content is intact.
